title: Rule
description: A rule fragment. Markdown body with optional frontmatter. Compiled to AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md/.cursorrules etc.

id.description: Stable identifier; usually the source filename without extension.

targets.description: If set, only emit to these adapter ids.

excludes.description: If set, do not emit to these adapter ids.

concat.description: Whether this rule is concatenated with siblings into one rules file (true) or kept as a separate file when the target supports it (false).

order.description: Sort key for concatenation order. Lower values appear first.
